title: cineraria geifolia
intro: Cineraria geifolia is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Cineraria geifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
